description: Voice first-run + voice settings copy used by R10 (I10-app-ux). Mirrors the canonical English copy in R10 §3.2 / §5 / §8. Translate by adding sibling json files (zh-CN, tl, ko, pt, vi, es, ja, de). English-only entries are acceptable for this wave; annotate locale coverage when adding new locales.

welcome.name: Welcome
welcome.subtitle: Grant mic access and meet your agent.
welcome.intro: You'll talk to your agent, and your agent will talk back. We'll take a minute to set that up.
welcome.micDenied: Microphone access was denied. You can grant it later in system settings.

tier.name: Device check
tier.subtitle: How your hardware will run voice.

models.name: Models
models.subtitle: Download voice models.
models.background: Continue in background — the model panel in Settings shows progress.

agentSpeaks.name: Listen
agentSpeaks.subtitle: Hear the agent introduce itself.
agentSpeaks.script: Hi — I'm Eliza. I'll listen when you talk and reply out loud. To recognise your voice across conversations I need to learn how you sound. Ready?

userSpeaks.name: Speak
userSpeaks.subtitle: Record three short prompts.
userSpeaks.capturedAll: Captured {{count}} of {{total}} samples. Tap Continue to confirm.

ownerConfirm.name: Owner
ownerConfirm.subtitle: Confirm you are the owner.
ownerConfirm.title: You are the OWNER. The agent will only execute privileged actions for you.

family.name: Family
family.subtitle: Add other people the agent might hear (optional).
family.description: Optional: introduce other people the agent might hear. You can add more anytime in Settings → Voice → Profiles.

section.title: Voice
section.tooltip: Continuous chat, wake word, profiles, and privacy.

continuous.title: Continuous chat
continuous.description: When on, the mic stays open and the agent decides when you finished speaking.

modes.offDescription: Push-to-talk only. Hold the mic to record.
modes.vadGatedDescription: Mic opens automatically when you start speaking and closes on silence.
modes.alwaysOnDescription: Mic stays on. The agent decides when you finished speaking and replies.

wake.title: Wake word
wake.description: Listen for a phrase like 'Hey Eliza' before opening the mic.

strategy.title: Local vs Cloud
strategy.description: Where speech recognition and synthesis run.

models.title: Models
models.empty: Voice models will appear here once they're available. Voice updates appear automatically on Wi-Fi; on cellular we'll ask first.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.cloudCacheDescription: Lets Eliza Cloud cache the agent's short opener phrases for faster replies. Disabled by default.
privacy.autoLearnDescription: When the agent hears an unfamiliar voice, build a profile for them automatically.

profiles.title: Voice profiles
profiles.empty: No voice profiles yet. They'll appear here automatically when the agent hears a distinct voice (or you can add one in first-run).
profiles.ownerCannotDelete: Owner profile cannot be deleted from this panel.
